source_note: Oregon PUC Order No. 21-457 (entered December 7, 2021) in the matter of Portland General Electric Company's 2020 Annual Power Cost Variance / Power Cost Adjustment Mechanism (PCAM) (9 pp) — the Commission's review of the difference between PGE's actual and forecast net variable power costs. Listed for reference (metadata-only). Source: Oregon PUC orders archive (apps.puc.state.or.us/orders/2021ords/21-457.pdf).
